remarks: Welcome to 85 Hecker Avenue, a stunning custom rebuild in the heart of Darien's coveted Noroton neighborhood, where modern luxury meets everyday convenience. Thoughtfully designed with 4 spacious bedrooms and 5 full bathrooms, this turnkey home features an open-concept floor plan centered around a beautifully appointed kitchen and inviting living spaces, along with a dedicated home office for today's flexible lifestyle. The finished walkout lower level offers exceptional bonus living space, perfect for entertaining, guests, a gym, or media room. Upstairs, the luxurious primary suite serves as a private retreat, while the additional bedrooms provide generous space and comfort. Step outside to your own resort-like setting featuring a covered patio with a fireplace, a private fire pit, and a picturesque waterfall, creating the ultimate backdrop for year-round entertaining and relaxation. Just minutes from the Noroton Heights train station, I-95, Darien Commons, Heights Crossing, Equinox, Sweetgreen, Gregorys Coffee, and some of Fairfield County's best shopping and dining, this exceptional home is also served by the highly sought-after Tokeneke Elementary School. A rare opportunity to enjoy brand-new construction quality, incredible outdoor living, and one of Darien's most desirable locations.
